items.text: 5 tests Kevin Warsh will face as Fed chair
items.summary: Wall Street and Washington will be watching to see how he reacts to political pressure and whether he can get the central bank on board with the major changes he favors.
items.text_it: 5 test che Kevin Warsh affronterà come presidente della Fed
items.summary_it: Wall Street e Washington staranno a guardare per vedere come reagirà alle pressioni politiche e se riuscirà a coinvolgere la banca centrale con i principali cambiamenti che favorisce.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Inflation will likely be higher for longer. Your retirement plan isn’t built for that.
items.summary: Official CPI masks double-digit spikes in healthcare, insurance and energy. Meanwhile, an outdated strategy quietly drains your portfolio.
items.text_it: L'inflazione sarà probabilmente più alta più a lungo. Il tuo piano pensionistico non è fatto per questo.
items.summary_it: L'IPC ufficiale maschera i picchi a due cifre nel settore sanitario, assicurativo ed energetico. Nel frattempo, una strategia obsoleta prosciuga silenziosamente il tuo portafoglio.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: What CEOs from Tesla, Nvidia and over a dozen other companies hope to gain by joining Trump in China
items.summary: On his visit to China this week, President Donald Trump is bringing along at least 17 executives from prominent U.S. companies. Here’s what it means for them.
